evals.prompt: Use playwright stealth to extract the full content from a blog post URL I provide — I want the title, full article text, and any metadata you can find.
evals.expected_output: Structured markdown report with blog post title, full article content preserved in markdown format, metadata (author, date, tags), plus diagnostics showing bot detection handling.

evals.prompt: Get a public profile page content from a URL I provide — extract all visible structured data (name, headline, sections, etc).
evals.expected_output: Structured markdown report with profile data extracted from visible page content, plus diagnostics. Should handle auth walls gracefully if encountered.
